signals.headline: Market Implication:** This signals coalition strain but confirms the UDF plans to govern—the dispute concerns only which
signals.raw: Market Implication:** This signals coalition strain but confirms the UDF plans to govern—the dispute concerns only which Congress leader will hold the CM position, not whether the UDF will form government. Results on May 4 will provide clarity.

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts—no new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions today on April 17, 2026, that would move prediction markets.[1]**
